title: Seven products by USA-based design brands
summary:
Dezeen Showroom: from sumptuous couches to cutting-edge workstations, the following products are all included in the catalogues of brands based in the USA. The following selection comprises seating, flooring, wall coverings, workplace furniture, statement lighting and surfaces. They have been released by brands from across the country, from Seattle and Los Angeles on the West

The post Seven products by USA-based design brands appeared first on Dezeen.
